attempted_baseline_field.field: Number of Full Time Equivalent (FTE) employees

prior Aureon Project Impact baseline records show FTE employees = 1
attempt_methods: Playwright fill on visible govuk input then Continue
human-style coordinate click/type/Continue through Chrome control
attempted_baseline_field.result_readback: Question reopened after Continue and value was blank; review page did not show the value.

controls: Project Impact final Submit was not pressed
No partner invitation, email, upload, or Drive send attempted
No partner-dependent forecast, readiness, budget, or grant-total value invented

next_actions: Return to Project Impact after provider save behavior changes or manual browser interaction can persist the baseline values.
Use only evidenced baseline values unless partner, market, budget and readiness evidence is recorded.
Do not press Project Impact Submit until review page visibly shows all required values.
